query: extreme overexposure blown out highlights white sky photograph
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: exposure extremes — overexposed/blown highlights, silhouettes against white sky, washed-out high-key minimalism

response.objective_caption: Tall, leafless tree trunks rise vertically through the frame, their bare branches forming dense networks against a bright sky. Strong backlighting from the sun creates silhouettes of the trees in the upper center of the composition. The branches interlace against the pale background, and a small green reflection appears below the central light source. The image is framed by a thin white border.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Tall, leafless tree trunks rise vertically through the frame, their bare branches forming dense networks against a bright sky. The sun is captured with extreme overexposure, creating a large blown-out white mass in the upper center that radiates outward, accompanied by a horizontal streak of light washing across the frame reminiscent of an analog light leak. The trees appear as dark silhouettes against the pale background. A small green reflection appears below the central light source. The image is framed by a thin white border.
